caption: A man with a shaved head, a beard, and tattoos on his arm wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt while sitting in a studio. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm, with a backdrop of dark grey acoustic foam panels. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with both hands. He begins by raising his right hand in front of his face with an open palm, then shifts his movement to gesture outward with both hands. His facial expressions change as he speaks, with his mouth open and eyes focused toward someone off-screen. The microphone remains stationary in the foreground, though the man's hand movements occasionally overlap the equipment. No text or logos are visible on his clothing or the background.
